outcome: Added live file watching via watchfiles with graph-index --watch CLI flag. Watcher filters by supported extensions and gitignore, triggers incremental re-indexing on changes.

changes.description: New SourceFileFilter and FileWatcher classes wrapping watchfiles with extension/gitignore filtering
Added ContextGraph.watch() method that runs initial index then watches for file changes
Fixed initialize() to mkdir parent directory before KuzuDB init
Added --watch flag to graph-index CLI with human and JSON event streaming output
13 tests for SourceFileFilter, FileWatcher, and ContextGraph.watch()
5 CLI integration tests for graph-index --watch with subprocess + SIGINT

commit: feat(context-graph): add live file watching via watchfiles with graph-index --watch CLI
